---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

:::: {.cv-wrapper}

::: {.sidebar}

 ![](avatar.jpeg){.avatar}

# Luis Jorge Ruiz Reyes {.sidebar-name}
### Desarrollador de Software & Analista de Datos {.sidebar-title}

::: {.divider}
:::

## Contact {.section-label}

::: {.contact-item}
📧 luisjruizreyes@gmail.com
:::
::: {.contact-item}
📧 luisjruiz@ciencias.unam.mx
:::
::: {.contact-item}
🐙 [github.com/ljrr-dev](https://github.com/ljrr-dev)
:::
::: {.contact-item}
📍 Ciudad de México, MX
:::

::: {.divider}
:::
## Languajes & Technology {.section-label}

::: {.skill-block}
**Inglés**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y5}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
Conversational level · Technical Documentation
:::
:::

::: {.skill-block}
**Python 4 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y4}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
FastAPI · Flask · NumPy · Plotly · CatBoost · XGBoost ·Prophet · Jupyter Notebooks · Quarto
:::
:::

::: {.skill-block}
**Java 3 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y3}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
Spring Boot · Hibernate · Maven · OOP · Functional
:::

:::


::: {.skill-block}
**JavaScript 2 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y2}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
React · Angular · Node.js 
:::
:::

::: {.skill-block}
**Kotlin Android Development 1 año**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y1}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
Android Studio · Physical Phone Sensors · Foreground Services  
:::

:::

::: {.skill-block}
**Bash / Linux 4 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y4}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
CLI tools · scripting · Docker · WSL
:::

:::

::: {.skill-block}
**SQL 3 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y3}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
PostgreSQL · SQLite · MySQL
:::
:::

::: {.skill-block}
**AI 3 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y3}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
Few shot prompting · XML Tags · Context Injection · Machine Learning · RAG
:::

:::

::: {.skill-block}
**DevOps 2 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y2}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
Docker · Kubernetes · CI/CD pipelines · Bamboo · Gitlab · Github Actions
:::

:::

::: {.skill-block}
**Test Driven Development 2 years**

::: {.skill-bar}

::: {.skill-fill .y2}
:::

:::

::: {.frameworks}
Junit · Mockito · CI/CD pipelines 
:::

:::


::: {.divider}
:::

## Otras Herramientas {.section-label}

::: {.tag-cloud}
[Docker]{.tag} [Kubernetes]{.tag} [Git]{.tag} 
[Postman]{.tag} [SOAPUI]{.tag} [CURL]{.tag}
[Quarto]{.tag} [Jupyter]{.tag}
[VSCodium]{.tag} [Linux]{.tag}  [IntelliJ]{.tag}
[OWASP]{.tag} [SNYK]{.tag} [Blackduck/Synopsys]{.tag}


:::

:::

::: {.main-content}

## Summary {.cv-section}

::: {.summary-block}
Backend developer with over 4 years of experience including banking and financial systems. My Strenghts are microservices architecture with Spring Boot and other Java applications, including evergreening and legacy systems updating to current standars. Security focused development: My experience includes a heacy focus on secure development, including backlog and techincal debt management as well as CVE remediaton, SAST and DAST analysis, dependency management in regulated envoirments with CI/CD pipelines through entire lifecycles, from Development, to SIT, UAT, Performance and Productive envoirments.
Complementary frontend experience with React, Angular and PHP for Dashboard and massive survey services on white label software.
:::

::: {.divider}
:::

## Experience {.cv-section}

::: {.job}
### Developer & Data Analyst {.job-title}
**Freelance** · April 2026 — Present · CDMX {.job-meta}

- Code vulnerability assessment.
- Security mitigation strategies and pre-audit remediation.
- Migration planning and technology modernization proposals.
:::

::: {.job}
### Fullstack Developer {.job-title}
**Clientship CX** · January 2026 — March 2026 · CDMX {.job-meta}

- Dashboard development with React under Whitelabel and Multitenant architecture.
- Feature integration for survey services in PHP.
- Resilience mechanisms integration in microservices with external dependencies.
- Microservices integration with bulk messaging services (Twilio, SendGrid, Infobip).
- Backlog generation and vulnerability identification through static and dynamic code analysis.
:::

::: {.job}
### Backend Developer / Consultant {.job-title}
**Capgemini** · Aug 2024 — Jan 2026 · CDMX {.job-meta}

Development and evolution of banking microservices within technology modernization programs, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams and business areas.

**Aug 2024 — Nov 2025**

- Platform migration and application evergreening, ensuring operational stability and service continuity.
- Vulnerability remediation and code quality control integrated into CI/CD pipelines aligned with corporate standards.
- Coordination of development, testing and deployment activities via JIRA across distributed teams.
- Backend development with Spring Framework applying maintainability and scalability criteria.
- Code auditing with Sonar, Snyk and Synopsys supporting technical decision-making and risk reduction.

**Nov 2025 — Jan 2026**

- Evaluation and execution of production/testing environment homologation strategies and cloud migration, with direct impact on operational costs and deployment times.
- CI/CD process improvement across multiple environments via Bamboo.
- Architecture analysis and accompaniment in digital transformation considering both technical and operational requirements.
- Definition and tracking of technical debt remediation plans prioritized by operational impact.
- Direct liaison with management and executive teams, aligning business objectives with technical execution.
- Development team coordination and leadership, fostering collaboration, knowledge transfer and continuous performance improvement.
:::

::: {.job}
### Software Research & Development {.job-title}
**Paso sin Miedo** · Aug 2023 — Jul 2024 · CDMX {.job-meta}

Applied research and development initiatives focused on new technology adoption and progressive improvement of technical capabilities.

- Exploration and evaluation of approaches, tools and architectures considering technical feasibility and operational impact.
- Development of PoCs and functional prototypes to validate solutions prior to production adoption.
- Comparative analysis of emerging technologies and industry practices supporting informed decisions in modernization processes.
- Collaboration with development and architecture teams for knowledge transfer and gradual incorporation of new solutions.
- Documentation of technical findings and recommendations, contributing to the evolution of internal standards and best practices.
- Cloud deployment of applications on Ubuntu VMs with SQL and NoSQL databases.
- Frontend and backend feature implementation on web dashboard using Angular and Node.js.
:::

## Educación {.cv-section}

::: {.edu}
### Math Major {.edu-title}
**Facultad de Ciencias, UNAM** 

+100% credits 
:::

::: {.edu}
### Máster in Data Science {.edu-title}
**Nuclio Digital School** · Barcelona 
:::


::: {.edu}
### Introduction to Cybersecurity {.edu-title}
**Cisco** 
:::

::: {.edu}
### Paramedic level Emergency Medical Techinician {.edu-title}
**Certificación internacional** 

+12 certifications with international recognition · Relevant CV available if relevant

:::

```{=html}
<button id="theme-toggle" title="Cambiar tema">🌙</button>
<script>
  const btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.body.classList.toggle('light');
    btn.textContent = document.body.classList.contains('light') ? '☀️' : '🌙';
    btn.classList.remove('switching');
    void btn.offsetWidth; // reflow para re-triggerear animación
    btn.classList.add('switching');
  });
</script>
```

```{=html}
<a id="download-btn" href="Dev_Luis_Jorge_Ruiz_english.pdf" download="Dev_Luis_Jorge_Ruiz_english.pdf" title="Download CV">
  ⬇
</a>
```

::::
